arguments: task objective, target paths, and required evidence
body: Run product validation over source loading, policy, renderer output, deploy/uninstall, hooks, model rules, drift, and runtime isolation. Validate durable product behavior, provider schemas, ownership, and acceptance outcomes; do not add or approve tests that only encode a one-off conversation correction. The route must declare owner, permissions, allowed tools, validation expectations, output contract, hook expectations, and provider-specific differences.
